events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Multi-talented global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor', celebrates her 57th birthday.

angles.name: J-Lo's enduring appeal
angles.copy: Happy 57th to the one and only Jennifer Lopez! From the Bronx to global icon, she's still bringing the heat. What's your favourite J-Lo track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll icon
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the iconic Rolling Stones frontman. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's game-changing debut
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever by playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, though? We'll let you decide.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Britpop cornerstone
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and cemented their place in rock history. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, love, and music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: The King's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only Elvis Presley today. His music continues to inspire and entertain generations worldwide.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas, passing away six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's lasting impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today, a voice that shaped a generation and continues to resonate. His legacy lives on through his music.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar playing continues to influence musicians across the globe.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road's enduring magic
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders' punk icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose attitude and music continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, becoming a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine's message endures
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: The iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod's quarter-century
angles.copy: It's 25 years since the original iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today. The legendary Beatle and peace activist was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's enduring spirit
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album's anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. A true journey through their diverse genius.
